summary:
RUSSIA AND GLOBAL CONFLICT: Brandon recounts a vision regarding Vladimir Putin and the escalation of international conflicts beyond Ukraine. Brandon describes an impending strike on Poland, specifically near the city of Warsaw, using a massive, unprecedented, and non-nuclear weapon. Brandon explains that this specific event will serve as a major catalyst for World War III in Europe and mentions the approaching Gog and Magog war involving Russia.

ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND BIOLOGICAL THREATS: Brandon details a warning about a dark plan involving artificial intelligence, DNA modification, and the creation of a super virus. Brandon explains that this biological threat is designed to eliminate obese individuals and is linked to high blood pressure and diabetic medications. Brandon notes that these divine warnings are given in advance so that people can pray to delay, stop, or avoid these dangers, mentioning a specific mandate he received to lose weight.

END TIMES CHRONOLOGY AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon outlines a sequence of eschatological events, stating that severe global judgments, including the Tribulation, Jacob's Trouble, and the implementation of the Beast system with its tracking chips, will occur after the Rapture of the church. Brandon clarifies that a massive economic crash and the resulting financial sector struggles will manifest following the departure of millions of people, noting that the global system implementation will be a gradual process.

PROPHETIC TIMELINES AND ACCELERATION: Brandon discusses an impending acceleration of global events aligning with specific prophetic markers. Brandon references discussions by Pastor Paul Begley and Mike from the channel "Around the World" concerning the end times and the sacrifice of a pure red heifer during Passover. Brandon highlights the correlation between these events and the American eclipse on April 8th, describing a snowball effect in the economy, wars, and celestial signs leading up to the imminent return of Jesus.

SPIRITUAL OUTPOURING AND REVIVAL: Brandon shares a message about a forthcoming, unprecedented wave of the Holy Ghost, referencing writings by Brother Hagin. Brandon describes this wave as being twice as powerful as previous healing and charismatic revivals, requiring intense prayer and speaking in tongues to manifest. Brandon states that this spiritual outpouring will bring massive supernatural healings, deliverance from satanic bondage, and significant financial breakthroughs, including mentions of Bitcoin reaching record highs.

TARGETED INTERCESSIONS: Brandon relays specific intercessory focal points, prioritizing the nation of Israel and the Mossad. Brandon also details a spiritual operation concerning America, commanding the removal of a demon spirit operating over the White House and praying for the nation to remain uninvolved in conflicts while experiencing a massive spiritual outpouring and angelic assistance.
rawData: [March 02, 2024]-[Pray with me for 1 hour]-[https://youtu.be/qCWodRZNFaw]-[Hey, good morning family! I'm excited to be with y'all again today. I'm going to do another 'pray with me' video to motivate yourself to pray. I started doing these videos because one of the main missions of why God put me on YouTube and what He told me to do was come on here and pray about the end times, Israel, and where we are in the end times. We can pray together in the spirit. I do it alongside another audience because it doesn't make it so awkward for me, just praying by myself on a camera like this. This is with sister Billie Brim and with Lynne Hammond, and there are a lot of great prayer warriors that we're going to pray with today. It's just been on my heart; I told you all almost a year ago about one of the visions that the Lord showed me about Putin and the escalation of the war, and that this would not just stop with Ukraine. The Lord warned me that there would be a strike against Poland and that this would be one of the main things that escalate into World War III through Europe. Russia would use a weapon that's never been used before on Poland. I asked the Lord because I thought it was nuclear, and the Lord told me, 'This is not a nuclear weapon; this is a weapon that's never been used before.' It was massive, and it hit near Warsaw. It was a big city with a 'W' I saw in the spirit, but I have an urgency in my spirit that is trying to speed up. I believe we're going to see wars and rumors of wars. A lot of people wanted to know more about what I saw regarding DNA codes and the virus. They're asking if the medicine is bad. No, I want everybody to understand what I'm trying to say here. Like I said, I'm not coming on here to preach fear; I'm telling you what I see when I pray. The Lord gives me these things so we can either delay them, stop them altogether, or they're going to happen regardless, but He's warning me about things that are about to manifest. The Lord said, 'Brandon, I'm mandating you to get the weight off.' That was a year ago, and He speaks to me way in advance of what He believes is coming. He talks to me about the oil, crypto, and many other things, sometimes years in advance. This is another thing I really believe we're about to see regarding taking DNA with AI and creating a virus, a superbug, to eliminate obese people. It was created because the obesity rates were so astronomical. There are things I see that are very dark, and the Lord warns me about what the enemy is planning. I don't get in fear over it; I know that Jesus said no weapon formed against me would prosper. He wants us to listen to Him and be quick to obey in these last days. He may say, 'Don't go to this place,' and if you go, it could cost you your life. We need to be quick to pray and obey. I told you all I let food dominate me, and I didn't listen last year, but now the Lord is warning me to get the weight off, so I'm working on that. He will show you things to come. In that last video, I tried to comfort you all to listen to what the Spirit of the Lord is saying about the enemy's plans regarding DNA code. I saw the high blood pressure medicine and diabetic medicine, and they were using AI to make a super virus. We have authority in this earth. Revelation talks about how half of the population of the world will perish. A lot of these things are coming for the Tribulation, for Jacob's Trouble, for the seven years. I don't believe the church is going to go through that. God's not a wife-beater, and I believe we're going to be raptured out of here before all this starts. People want to know if the financial crisis is going to happen. The Lord showed me that a lot of these things will manifest after the Rapture of the church. The financial sector and all the major economic struggle will happen after millions of us are raptured out of here, which will cause a great economic crash. They will bring in that Beast system, but it didn't happen instantaneously when the Rapture took place. The chip and all those things took time to get around and get people ready for it. Last night, I was praying and the Lord told me to go on Pastor Paul Begley's channel and watch his video. I listened to Mike from Around the World and Pastor Paul Begley talking about the end times, where we are with the red heifer. It stood out to me because the prophetic word the Lord gave me was that when Passover comes, there's going to be an acceleration of things beyond what He told me about Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah. This is going to be another time of great acceleration with the economy, the war, and signs in the heavens. It sounded to me like they're wanting to sacrifice that pure red heifer on Passover. Here we are, according to what I heard Pastor Paul Begley talking about, seeing an acceleration take place at Passover. There's fruit of it; they're talking about sacrificing this red heifer now. It sounds like a big end-times event. Then we have the big American eclipse taking place on the 8th of April. It's like a snowball going down a hill, getting bigger and bigger. Jesus is coming quickly. He said, 'My Son's return for the bride is imminent.' It's time for us to get serious. I believe we're about to see Gog and Magog, the war with Russia and the hook in the mouth pulling Russia down. I'm going to play this prayer video. Let's just pray. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, we're about to see one of the greatest manifestations of the glory of God that this world has ever seen.' Supernatural healings and manifestations of the glory of God are coming before the catching away. I believe we're going to see financial breakthroughs for people. Bitcoin is already going back up to record highs. So, let's get started and pray with Sister Billie here. Father, I thank You, Lord. We take up Israel now. We pray for the military and the Mossad. All hands on that now for the operation of God. Lord, we praise You for Your angelic operation for the nations of the earth. America, you shall be saved! Spirit of darkness, loose your grip on this nation in Jesus' name. We command an outpouring of God across this land, with angelic assistance. We pray that America stays out of it. You demon spirit that has been in operation over our White House, in the name of Jesus, you loose your hold and your grip. I command the counsel of the wise to see it. We depend upon the help of the Holy Spirit. Father, things that are in Your heart, we ask You for that nation. We ask You for that possession of ours. All Your operations in the earth, the ones we see and the ones we don't, are flowing out. There is help. We're making power available through prayers lifted up. We pray for healings right now. It has been reserved for this time. Get out! It's time to go! Be free in Jesus. I want to read something that Brother Hagin wrote. These moves of the Spirit come in waves. There's another wave coming, but we have to enter into a deeper realm of prayer to give birth to what God wants to do. When you pray in tongues, you give impetus to the next move of God's Spirit before that spiritual wave is ever seen. God is calling us to pray in these last days. Before He comes, there's something He wants to do through us, His body. He's calling us to yield to the promptings of the Holy Ghost. The next wave is about to burst upon us in all of its glory. We've seen the healing revival, the charismatic movement, and the wave of faith, but now another wave is coming: the wave of the Holy Ghost. You've seen the power in a limited fashion, but a wave is coming that will bring His power on a higher level and in a far greater measure than we've ever seen heretofore. I can see that wave building. I'm convinced the wave that's coming will be twice as high as what we've seen in the past. Glory to God! We walk in boldness in these end times, with waves of the glory of God delivering people from satanic bondage. The European wave is coming down all throughout England and upon the nations. Father, we just thank You and give You praise. I see manifestations of the glory of God. There is a move of God the world has never seen before about to happen—a major outpouring of the Spirit right before the catching away of the church. I want you to agree with me right now that there is a major move of God happening in your house, your finances, your marriage, and your life. The 'suddenlies' are going to start to happen like popcorn in your life. Believe big in 2024. That was powerful. I'm going to do more of these. I want to encourage you all: great things are going to manifest for you and your family. Don't give up. The sky is not falling; great days are ahead. I call you healed, whole, and well. Delivered and set free by the power of the Holy Spirit. Today is a good day, and God's a good God. Thank you for joining me and praying with me. We are mighty together as a unit, praying all over the world. Put a smile on your face and a song on your heart. Jesus loves you so much. God bless you all and have a wonderful night. Bye-bye.]
